value.found_quote: Claude Fable 5 (claude-fable-5) is Anthropic's most capable widely released model.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Claude Fable 5 as Anthropic's most capable widely released model, with API IDs, pricing, and a general availability date of June 9, 2026, confirming Anthropic offers it. The page states it is generally available across multiple platforms, indicating active status.
